title: LLM foundations: pretraining, scaling laws, KV cache + DSA 2-D DP
focus: Chinchilla scaling, decoder-only at inference, emergent abilities debate.

items.label: Pretraining: data, scaling laws (Chinchilla)
interviewQuestions: Walk me through Chinchilla scaling laws — what's the data:parameters ratio?
Why has 'compute-optimal' training overtaken 'parameter-optimal' as the design target?

items.label: Build a GPT dataset for next-token prediction
interviewQuestions: How do you turn raw text into input-target pairs for GPT next-token prediction?
What are block size, context window, and stride in a language-model dataset?
How do train/validation splits prevent contamination in LLM pretraining or fine-tuning?

items.label: Decoder-only transformer for LLMs
interviewQuestions: Walk me through one forward pass of a decoder-only LLM at inference time.
What is the KV cache and why is it so important?

items.label: Emergent abilities & in-context learning
interviewQuestions: Define 'emergent abilities' in LLMs — and why some researchers say they're a measurement artifact.
What does the 'mirage' paper claim, and how does the choice of metric drive apparent emergence?

tracks.label: ML Coding Lab · LLM fundamentals implementation

items.label: Implement a GPT-style dataset collator from raw token IDs
interviewQuestions: Implement a dataset that returns input tokens and next-token targets from a long token stream.
How do block size, stride, padding, and masking affect the training examples?
What test catches a target/input off-by-one bug?

items.label: Implement temperature, top-k, and top-p sampling from logits
interviewQuestions: Implement temperature scaling, top-k filtering, and nucleus sampling from a logits vector.
What numerical-stability issue appears before softmax, and how do you avoid it?
How do you test that top-p never samples outside the retained probability mass?

items.label: Trace KV-cache tensor shapes through one autoregressive decode step
interviewQuestions: What are the key/value cache shapes for batch, heads, sequence length, and head dimension?
Why does prefill latency differ from decode latency?
What bug would cause generated tokens to ignore previous context?

references.label: Reddit — practical ML coding questions candidates report
